stemHtml: An aircraft follows a great circle in the Northern Hemisphere. At a certain moment the aircraft is in the position on the great circle where the great circle direction is 270°(T). Continuing on the great circle the

options.a: track angle will decrease and the latitude will decrease.
options.b: track angle will increase and the latitude will increase.
options.c: track angle will increase and the latitude will decrease.
options.d: track angle will decrease and the latitude will increase.
